title: glyceria fluitans subsp. declinata
intro: Glyceria fluitans subsp. declinata, also known as declinate mannagrass, is a type of aquatic plant belonging to the family Poaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Glyceria fluitans subsp. declinata include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and act as an antiseptic. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are used to treat various health issues, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
